name: facilities coordinators in medical clinics processing 5–15 service requests/month tool
description: For facilities coordinators in medical clinics processing 5–15 service requests/month, delayed maintenance scheduling causes equipment downtime. We automate scheduling and alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
target_audience: facilities coordinators in medical clinics processing 5–15 service requests/month
